---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  # Year-scoped visible listings (add new block when first post of a new year is published)
  - id: posts-2026
    contents: "posts/2026-*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    feed: true
    categories: true

  - id: posts-2024
    contents: "posts/2024-*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    feed: true
    categories: true

  - id: posts-2018
    contents: "posts/2018-*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    feed: true
    categories: true

  - id: posts-2010
    contents: "posts/2010-*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    feed: true
    categories: true
---

<!-- MAINTENANCE: when first post of a new year is published, add a new ## YYYY heading,
     :::{#posts-YYYY}::: div, and a new listing block (contents: "posts/YYYY-*/index.qmd").
     Add feed: true and categories: true to the new year block. -->

:::{.blog-archive-content}

## 2026

:::{#posts-2026}
:::

## 2024

:::{#posts-2024}
:::

## 2018

:::{#posts-2018}
:::

## 2010

:::{#posts-2010}
:::

:::
